title: Shared Everything
description: With this mod you share everthing with the other Player
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85aaf9b868b7601893278839b5f1089e900ce049.png)

---
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

> **Every player. One fate. No secrets.**

Shared Everything is a Fabric multiplayer mod that **links all online players together** — what happens to one, happens to all. Health, hunger, experience, effects, and inventory are fully synchronized across every player on the server in real time.

---

**📷 Media**

*Screenshots coming soon!*

---

<details>
<summary>⚙️ What gets shared?</summary>

❤️ **Health**  
Damage taken by one player is instantly distributed to all others. Healing works the same way — recover together or die together.

🍗 **Hunger & Saturation**  
Food levels are constantly averaged across all players. Eating feeds everyone. Starving hurts everyone.

⭐ **Experience & Levels**  
Every XP gain is shared in real time. Kill a mob, gain XP — and so does every other player online. Level up as a team.

🧪 **Status Effects**  
Drink a strength potion? Everyone gets strong. Get poisoned? Everyone suffers. The most powerful active effect always applies to all players.

🎒 **Inventory**  
Every item picked up, crafted, or moved is immediately mirrored to all connected players. One inventory for everyone.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

This mod is perfect for players who:

• Want a **true shared survival** experience with friends  
• Love **high-stakes multiplayer** where every decision affects the whole group  
• Are looking for a **unique challenge** beyond normal co-op gameplay  
• Want to run **events or challenges** where teams must cooperate perfectly  
• Enjoy **experimental and chaotic** multiplayer scenarios  

Whether you're carefully coordinating every move or descending into beautiful chaos — Shared Everything makes multiplayer feel like nothing else.

</details>

<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

• **Server-side only** — clients do NOT need to install the mod  
• Requires **Fabric API**  
• Players in **Creative or Spectator** mode are excluded from damage and hunger sync  
• Syncs every **4 ticks** (~5 times per second) for smooth performance  
• Works best with **2 or more players** online — no effect with a single player  
• Compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.1 + Fabric Loader 0.16.5+**  

</details>
